title: buccella nidifica
side_effects: Buccella nidifica can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to respiratory problems, including bronchitis and asthma-like symptoms. The plant's toxic compounds can also interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and reduce their effectiveness or increase the risk of bleeding. Furthermore, improper use of Buccella nidifica can cause liver damage and other organ-related issues, especially when combined with other health conditions.
